## New External MCP Server

**Name:** `mcps/___`
**Package:** (npm package name or GitHub repo URL)
**Auth type:** none / api_key / oauth2

### Checklist

- [ ] `meta.json` follows `schemas/mcp_meta.schema.json`
- [ ] `README.md` included with setup instructions
- [ ] No secrets or absolute paths in any file
- [ ] Package is publicly accessible
- [ ] Description and capabilities are specific enough for runtime matching
- [ ] Tested locally with `npx -y <package>`
